scope.selection_note: Codex-only deterministic prep from current route/corridor canonical JSONL, current merges, current do-not-merge guards, and live validateRepo duplicate_global_identity messages after identity149-152 were applied. Proposals avoid stale ids, already-applied route/corridor aliases from identity147/151, identity144 route/corridor aliases, existing merge aliases, alias records that are already merge targets, target records that are merge aliases, do-not-merge pairs, and corridor segment/superset traps.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both current records identify the Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown corridor. The alias is a two-source South Bronx Crosstown record with Hunts Point to Riverside Drive limits; the target is the consolidated Bx6 South Bronx corridor with matching Hunts Point/Riverside Drive scope and richer Bx6 SBS planning evidence.

duplicate_issues: Global corridor records corridor_bx6-south-bronx and corridor_south-bronx-crosstown share identity key corridor_bx6-south-bronx.
Global corridor records corridor_bx6-south-bronx and corridor_south-bronx-crosstown share identity key corridor_bx6-south-bronx-crosstown.

payload_fields.limits: Riverside Drive West to Hunts Point

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records describe the same Bronx-Flushing-Jamaica / Flushing-Jamaica BRT corridor concept. The alias is a one-source record for the Bronx-Flushing-Jamaica corridor from the initial BRT/Phase II context; the target already carries the Bronx-Flushing-Jamaica corridor alias and merged source wording while consolidating the Flushing-Jamaica corridor evidence.

duplicate_issues: Global corridor records corridor_bronx-flushing-jamaica and corridor_flushing-jamaica share identity key corridor_bronx-flushing-jamaica-corridor.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both current records identify the paired Q20A/B local service on Main Street between Jamaica and College Point. The alias is a source-local Q20A/Q20B route mention from Jamaica CAC/Flushing-Jamaica sources; the target is the richer Q20AB Local record with matching route label, local service variant, and Flushing-Jamaica evidence.

duplicate_issues: Global route records route_q20-2014-10-07-flushing-jamaica and route_q20a-q20b-jamaica-cac2 share identity key route_q20a.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both current records are pre-SBS source-local Q44 route mentions in the Jamaica/Flushing-Jamaica context. The alias is a bare Q44 bus-stop route mention from Jamaica CAC2; the target is the richer pre-SBS Q44 record with the same Q44 identity plus local/limited pre-conversion source evidence. This direction avoids merging either record into the separate Q44 SBS record.

validator_evidence.duplicate_key_note: The live validator emits route_q44 duplicate messages for both records against the first prior Q44 collision in validation order; the shared current key is route_q44.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both current records identify the B6 local bus route in the Southern Brooklyn / Bay Parkway-Cropsey / B82 planning context. The alias is a single-source B6 local re-route mention from April 2017; the target is the consolidated B6 Local and Limited record already carrying the same South Brooklyn corridor context and multiple B6 local/limited evidence refs.

duplicate_issues: Global route records route_b6-2015-sbk-corridor and route_b6-apr2017 share identity key route_b6.

payload_fields.description: East-west bus route in south Brooklyn serving the South Brooklyn Crosstown corridor

exclusions_and_guards: Did not propose corridor_125th-street-manhattan -> corridor_125th-st-manhattan or the reverse; the current do-not-merge guard preserves differing 125th Street limits.
Did not repeat identity144 route/corridor aliases or route/corridor aliases already applied in identity147/151.
Skipped aliases missing from current canonical route/corridor JSONL, including aliases already removed by current merges.
Skipped aliases that are already current merge aliases and aliases that are already current merge targets, to avoid stale ids and target chains.
Skipped targets that are current merge aliases, alias==target pairs, and current do-not-merge hits.

Skipped corridor segment/superset traps, including Church Avenue, Lexington Avenue, Cross Bay Boulevard, Bay Parkway/Cropsey, Utica Avenue, Woodhaven Boulevard, Third Avenue, Main Street, and Livingston Street candidates where limits or bundled scope were not clearly identical.

Skipped route base-number collisions with variant conflicts or lifecycle relationships, including M60 local vs M60 SBS, B103 LTD vs B103E, B44/B46/B82 local-limited-SBS conflicts, Q52/Q53 LTD vs SBS, M23 local vs M23 SBS, and M34 local vs SBS/A variants.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval 'import { validateRepo } from "./packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts"; ... print duplicate_global_identity route/corridor messages'
command_evidence.result: Read-only validator inspection reported 730 duplicate_global_identity issues total and 73 route/corridor duplicate_global_identity messages.

command_evidence.command: jq inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, data/canonical/routes.jsonl, and data/canonical/corridors.jsonl
command_evidence.result: Confirmed current canonical presence, payload fields, record_aliases, source_ids, and evidence_refs for selected route/corridor records.
Checked the recent/stale route-corridor prep aliases to avoid repeats from identity144, identity147, and identity151.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<final guard script over selected pairs>'
command_evidence.result: All five selected aliases and targets are present in current canonical JSONL; none are already merge aliases; no alias is an existing merge target; no target is an existing merge alias; no alias equals target; no do-not-merge hit; no exact repeat in identity144/147/151.

No edits were made to data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, LOG.md, manifest files, canonical JSONL, wiki pages, DB files, submissions, or generated outputs.
